team_name: Nyayadarsi: AI-Driven Tender Evaluation and Governance Platform
summary: Design a platform that automates tender evaluation, bidder eligibility analysis, and produces explainable evaluation reports for government procurement.
optimization_claims: Scrutinizing the tender document itself to address criteria-drafting problems
Eliminating ghost work billing fraud and commission extraction
constraints_addressed: Inconsistent and legally indefensible manual tender evaluation
Deliberate document fraud by sophisticated bad actors
